overall.description: Cinematic first-person gameplay footage exploring a decayed teal-colored stadium structure in a futuristic city, transitioning from bright exterior sunlight down concrete stairs into a dark interior corridor with a metal roll-up door.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned stadium exterior plaza with grand staircase

agents.ego_description: approaching the decayed teal stadium structure along the exterior plaza, moving toward the grand staircase

entered.detail: large brutalist concrete structure with teal paint and DIG signage
large metallic skull wreckage embedded in the building facade
wide staircase leading up into the stadium structure
concrete barrier covered in colorful graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright morning exterior of a decayed futuristic stadium. The camera moves forward across the plaza toward a grand staircase, with the teal-colored brutalist structure and a prominent metal skull sculpture dominating the view. Graffiti covers the walls and the area is completely deserted.

events.description: entering deep shadow under the stadium overhang, sunlight fades significantly
moving from open exterior stairs into the covered underbelly of the structure

agents.ego_description: walking down the concrete stairs into increasingly shadowed areas beneath the stadium

entered.detail: massive concrete support columns holding up the stadium structure
rusted metal handrails along the stair edges

segments.scene_description: The camera descends the wide concrete stairs, transitioning from bright sunlight into the shadowed under-structure. Support pillars become visible as the exterior facade moves to the left. The lighting shifts dramatically from natural direct sun to dim, diffused shadow as the camera moves deeper under the overhang.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark service corridor with metal roll-up door

events.description: red laser sight beam appears, indicating weapon is drawn and aimed
slowing approach as reaching the illuminated metal roll-up door

agents.ego_description: moving cautiously through the dark corridor toward the metal door with weapon drawn, laser sight visible

entered.detail: large industrial metal shutter door with horizontal slats, dimly lit from behind
piles of broken concrete and debris scattered on the ground
shadowed concrete walls of the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dark, enclosed corridor beneath the stadium. A red laser sight beam cuts across the frame, indicating the player has drawn a weapon. The camera advances slowly toward a large metal roll-up door at the end of the passage, navigating around concrete rubble in the dimly lit space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, desolate stadium plaza into the oppressive darkness of an underground corridor. It begins by moving across a sunlit exterior toward a grand staircase, where a teal brutalist structure and a large metal skull sculpture loom over graffiti-covered walls. As the camera descends the wide concrete stairs, the scene shifts from direct morning sunlight into the dim, diffused shadows of the stadium's under-structure. The environment then closes in as the camera enters a dark enclosed passage, where a red laser sight cuts through the gloom while navigating around concrete rubble. Finally, the movement advances slowly through the dim light toward a large metal roll-up door at the end of the corridor.
